justification: The proposed feature involves adding a new parameter to existing functions (`numpy.argmax` and `numpy.argmin`) for randomized tie-breaking. This aligns with the 'Enhancement' label and the title of the issue.
current_state_summary: The issue is open, labeled as 'Enhancement', and proposes adding functionality to existing functions. Related issues are also enhancements but in different areas.

related_issues.title: np.hist: needs to be enabled for masked arrays (Trac #1214)
ENH: add out parameter to numpy.fromfile for memory-stable I/O
